name: Funeral Service
description_short: Funeral Service Credit Union is a specialized credit union chartered in 1983 that serves the funeral service industry with banking, lending, and professional vehicle financing.
description_long:
Funeral Service Credit Union was chartered in 1983 with a specific mission to serve the funeral service community. Unlike general-purpose banks, this credit union has built deep expertise in the unique financial needs of funeral directors and related professionals. The organization combines traditional credit union banking services with specialized financing programs tailored to the funeral industry.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including share savings accounts, vacation and Christmas clubs, checking accounts with no monthly fees or minimum balances, certificates of deposit (6-60 month terms), VISA credit cards with no annual fee, and both personal and professional vehicle loans. Their cuCheck/ATM cards function as both debit cards and ATM access at thousands of locations worldwide. Members can also establish payroll deductions for convenient savings and borrowing.

What distinguishes Funeral Service Credit Union is their specialization in professional vehicle financing for the funeral service industry. They explicitly finance hearses, limousines, professional vans, and other funeral service vehicles with no loan servicing fees, document preparation fees, or prepayment penalties. The organization emphasizes confidential, courteous service and competitive rates specifically designed for funeral directors, whether purchasing single vehicles or entire fleets. They market this expertise as their core competitive advantage.

Honestly, this is a legitimate niche credit union with solid conventional banking offerings. The funeral service specialization is real and meaningful, but the broader banking products (savings, checking, CDs, general loans for cars, appliances, vacations) are standard credit union fare. The main value proposition is the professional vehicle financing expertise and understanding of funeral industry cash flows and seasonal patterns. For general banking needs outside the funeral industry, members would have access to typical credit union services but no special advantages over larger institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Share Savings Accounts with quarterly dividend payments
Vacation Club with annual dividend payments (May 1 - April 30 cycle)
Christmas Club with annual payout (November 1 - October 31 cycle)
No-fee checking accounts with monthly dividends on $1,000+ daily balance
cuCheck/ATM Cards functioning as debit cards and ATM access worldwide
Certificates of Deposit with 6-60 month terms and $1,000 minimum ($500 PeeWee Club)
Personal and business vehicle loans (cars, trucks, vans, RVs)
Specialized professional vehicle financing for funeral service (hearses, limousines, professional vans)
Consumer loans for appliances, furniture, computers, vacations, and electronics
VISA Credit Cards (Classic and Platinum) with no annual or transaction fees
Payroll deduction programs for savings and loan payments
Loan rate information available monthly through credit union board pricing
pros: No monthly service fees, per-item fees, or minimum balance requirements on checking accounts
No annual fee on VISA Classic or Platinum cards with no balance transfer or cash advance fees
Specialized expertise and competitive rates for funeral service professional vehicle financing with no loan servicing or document preparation fees
No prepayment penalties on loans, allowing early payoff without financial penalty
Certificates of Deposit available with terms ranging 6-60 months and can be used as collateral for lower loan rates
Monthly dividend paid on checking accounts ($1,000 daily balance minimum) and quarterly/annual dividends on savings products
Payroll deduction option available for convenient savings and borrowing
cons: Limited appeal outside the funeral service industry; membership may require affiliation with funeral services
No information provided about current dividend rates, loan rates, or APY figures on any savings or credit products
Certificates of Deposit require $1,000 minimum opening balance ($500 for PeeWee Club), which may be prohibitive for some savers
Loan servicing limited to described categories (vehicles, computers, appliances, vacations); no mention of debt consolidation or larger personal loans
Website lacks details on membership eligibility requirements and how non-funeral-industry employees can join
best_for: Funeral directors and funeral service professionals needing specialized vehicle financing for hearses, limousines, and professional vans
Credit union members seeking no-fee checking and savings accounts with dividend-paying products
Funeral service business owners financing fleets of professional vehicles
Individuals wanting VISA credit cards with no annual fees and no balance transfer charges
diagnosis: Funeral Service Credit Union is best for funeral industry professionals needing specialized vehicle financing combined with standard credit union banking services. The main caveat is that outside the funeral service vehicle financing niche, this credit union offers standard—not exceptional—banking products, and membership eligibility may be restricted to funeral service affiliations.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
